creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Hello,

thank you for your patch!

I can confirm with an AMD Radeon RX 6700 XT that everything continues to working for me.

The only thing is that, i do see the message:

amdgpu: os_same_file_description couldn't determine if two DRM fds reference the same file description.
If they do, bad things may happen!

During usage of mpv and glxinfo | grep OpenGL.
